items.name: Magic Berry
items.description: A plump, glowing berry that mends small hurts. Restores 1 heart in battle.

items.name: Honey Jar
items.description: A spoonful of enchanted honey warms you from the inside. Restores 2 hearts in battle.

items.name: Oil
items.description: It makes rusty metal move smoothly again!

items.name: Crown of the Mouse King
items.description: Show this to any mouse, and they will help you once — no questions asked.

items.name: Raven's Frozen Feather
items.description: A feather from the mysterious Raven. It freezes time for a single moment — use it wisely.

items.name: Bucket of Water
items.description: Rumor has it the Wicked Witch of the West fears one thing above all — water.

items.name: Green-tinted Glasses
items.description: Wear these inside the Emerald City — the green light is too bright without them.

items.name: Broomstick of the Wicked Witch
items.description: A magic broomstick of the Wicked Witch
